title: Tsaw`ar #6686
definition:
Zuar = "littleness"

 1) father of Nethaneel, the chief of the tribe of Issachar at the
    time of the exodus and an assistant of Moses
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zuar = "littleness"

 1) father of Nethaneel, the chief of the tribe of Issachar at the
    time of the exodus and an assistant of Moses

    NASB:  little one, a man of Issachar
